LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF BAYVIEW HUNTERS POINT ARTS COUNCIL'S MOTION FOR PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION IS CONTINUED TO JUNE 25, 2014 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 302 TO GIVE MOVING PARTY THE OPPORTUNITY TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6B. MOVING PARTY MUST DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING PAPERS TO DEPARTMENT 302, WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE, NO LATER THAN JUNE 17, 2014 AT 4:00 P.M. OR THE MOTION WILL BE DENIED. ANY EXHIBIT MUST BE SEPARATED BY AN EXHIBIT TAB PER CRC 3.1110(F). THE COURT HAS COURTESY COPIES OF THE OPPOSITION PAPERS. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT, COURT REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR# 5976 (302)

LAW AND MOTION, 302, PLAINTIFF BAYVIEW HUNTERS POINT ARTS COUNCIL'S MOTION FOR PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION IS DENIED. PLAINTIFF FAILED TO JOIN INDISPENSABLE PARTIES, THE GRANTEES. (CCP 389(A).) TO THE EXTENT THAT PLAINTIFF ATTEMPTED TO CURE THIS DEFECT BY FILING A FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT AND SERVING A SUMMONS, THE MOTION IS UNTIMELY. PLAINTIFF FAILED TO TIMELY SERVE THE MOTION ON THE GRANTEES. (CCP 1005(B).) (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, NOT REPORTED. (302)

HEARING ORDERED FOR APPLICATION OF WAIVER OF COURT FEES
Off Calendar Sep-23-2015 Text Ruling

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jul-21-2015 Vacated

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Jun-26-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Hilary Hammell, of Bayview Hunters Point Community Legal, Tel. 415.735.4124, for plaintiffs;
Tara M. Steeley, of Office of the City Attorney, Tel. 415.554.4700, for defendants.

Ruling: A R G U E D. The Court required parties to appear. DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is granted. There is no evidence that the Art Commission ratified the creation of a policy body. The cause of action fails as a matter of law based on the undisputed facts. Prevailing party shall prepare form of order that complies with CRC 3.1312. Judge Suzanne Bolanos; Clerk Felicia Green; Court Reporter Melanie Gheno, CSR No. 7489; Dept. 302. (302/SB)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-05-2014 Set For Trial On Aug-03-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Nov-14-2014 Overruled
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Anda Kwong, Esq. of Bayview/Hunters Point Community Legal, Tel. 415.735.4124, for plaintiff and opposing party;
No other appearance.

RULING: The Court adopted the tentative ruling which was not opposed. DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT is overruled. Liberally construing the Second Amended Complaint, it adequately pleads facts establishing that the review panel was created by the initiative of the Arts Commission. (Second Amended Complaint, par. 17.) ORDER SIGNED. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Sheryl L. Sawyer CSR# 5976.

DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT

Amended Notice Of Motion And Motion For Preliminary Injunction
Off Calendar Jun-25-2014 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF BAYVIEW HUNTERS POINT ARTS COUNCIL'S (Amended) Motion For Preliminary Injunction is off calendar. The Amended Notice of Motion and Motion filed on June 17, 2014 was neither timely filed nor served. (CCP 1005(b).) Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.

Mtn For Prelim Inujunction
Off Calendar Jun-25-2014 Denied
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF BAYVIEW HUNTERS POINT ARTS COUNCIL'S Motion For Preliminary Injunction is denied. Plaintiff failed to join indispensable parties, the grantees. (CCP 389(a).) To the extent that Plaintiff attempted to cure this defect by filing a First Amended Complaint and serving a summons, the motion is untimely. Plaintiff failed to timely serve the motion on the grantees. (CCP 1005(b).) (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.

Mtn For Prelim Inujunction
Off Calendar Jun-17-2014 Continued To Jun-25-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PLAINTIFF BAYVIEW HUNTERS POINT ARTS COUNCIL's Motion For Preliminary Injunction is continued to June 25, 2014 to give moving party the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Moving party must deliver courtesy copies of the moving papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than June 17, 2014 at 4:00 p.m. or the motion will be denied. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f). The court has courtesy copies of the opposition papers. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert ; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR # 5976 =(302/MJM)
